name: Artichoke Tart in Walnut Pastry
recipeIngredient: 8 tablespoons cold unsalted butter, cut into pieces
6 ounces jar of marinated artichoke hearts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C) for 10 minutes.
2. Sauté scallions and garlic in butter until softened.
3. Combine cream, eggs, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl.
4. Sprinkle grated cheese over the bottom of the partially baked crust.
5. Bake for 35 minutes until golden and slightly puffy. Let rest for 10 minutes.
WALNUT PASTRY
1. Process walnuts until coarsely ground.
2. Add flour and salt to work into a dough; pulse just until it begins to hold together.
3. Place pieces of butter atop the dry ingredients and pulse until the mixture holds together.
4. Remove dough from the processor and shape into a flattened disc. Cover.
5. Roll out dough large enough to fit into a 10-inch quiche or tart pan.
